title: Commit Message
description: Commit message schema. Either a normal commit with subject and optional body/files, or a skip indicating no commit is needed. Uses anyOf discriminated union on the 'type' field.

anyOf.description: Variant for a normal commit message with subject, optional body, and optional file metadata.

type.description: Discriminator indicating a normal commit. Must be the literal string 'commit'.

subject.description: Commit subject line. Should be a concise imperative summary (e.g. 'Add validation to input handler').

body.description: Optional simple commit body. Use this for a single-block body. Mutually exclusive with body_summary/body_details/body_footer. Omit if not needed.

body_summary.description: Optional summary section of a detailed commit body. Use with body_details and/or body_footer for structured bodies. Mutually exclusive with body. Omit if not needed.

body_details.description: Optional details section of a detailed commit body. Use with body_summary and/or body_footer for structured bodies. Mutually exclusive with body. Omit if not needed.

body_footer.description: Optional footer section of a detailed commit body. Use with body_summary and/or body_details for structured bodies. Mutually exclusive with body. Omit if not needed.

files.description: Optional list of file paths the agent wants to commit. Each entry is a repo-relative path. Omit if not applicable.

items.description: A repo-relative file path to include in the commit.

excluded_files.description: Optional list of files explicitly excluded from the commit, with reasons. Omit if no files are excluded.

items.description: A file excluded from the commit with an explanation.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the excluded file.

reason.description: Why this file is excluded. Values: 'internal_ignore' (on internal ignore list), 'not_task_related' (changed but unrelated to the task), 'sensitive' (contains secrets or credentials), 'deferred' (will be committed later).

anyOf.description: Variant indicating the commit should be skipped (no changes to commit).

type.description: Discriminator indicating the commit is skipped. Must be the literal string 'skip'.

reason.description: Explanation of why the commit is being skipped. May contain markdown for formatting.
